g.text: OCI Network Security Group Reconcile Sequence
reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
[later pages until a match or exhaustion]
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with follow-up GetNetworkSecurityGroup calls until the resource is gone or not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
Reuse the tracked OCID from status or spec before any fresh lookup.
Move the Network Security Group compartment before calling the mutable update path when compartment drift exists.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
- The current formal notes remain lifecycle-centric even though the
implementation now reconciles tags and compartment moves.
- Paginated name lookup is only used when no status or spec OCID is
